inputs.task: BEM-948 P0 live object E2E. Create governance/reports/bem948_p0_live_object_e2e_20260620T0427Z.md and governance/proofs/BEM948_p0_live_object_executed_bem948_p0_live_object_e2e_20260620T0427Z.json. The proof must be truthful: status completed only after work is complete; include protocol BEM-948, trace_id, provider_selected claude_code, target_workflow_id claude.yml, dispatch_result executed, blocker null, and explicit sha_type for every SHA.

BEM-948 P0 minimal object-to-dispatch health test. Create exactly two files: governance/reports/bem948_p0_live_object_e2e_minimal_20260620T0432Z.md and governance/proofs/BEM948_p0_live_object_executed_bem948_p0_live_object_e2e_minimal_20260620T0432Z.json. The JSON must truthfully state completed only after work is done; include protocol BEM-948, this trace_id, provider_selected claude_code, target_workflow_id claude.yml, dispatch_result executed, blocker null, and sha_type for every SHA. Do not modify workflows.

BEM-948 P0 observed object-to-dispatch health test. Create exactly two files: governance/reports/bem948_p0_live_object_e2e_observer_20260620T0510Z.md and governance/proofs/BEM948_p0_live_object_executed_bem948_p0_live_object_e2e_observer_20260620T0510Z.json. The JSON must truthfully state completed only after work is done; include protocol BEM-948, this trace_id, provider_selected claude_code, target_workflow_id claude.yml, dispatch_result executed, blocker null, and sha_type for every SHA. Do not modify workflows.
BEM-938 selftest: GD object creates internal dispatch and curator routing plan

BEM-948 P0 binding-mode live object E2E. Return a strict JSON governance plan for WRK-C1 and the Claude provider object runtime binding. Include an objective, assumptions, at least three specific steps, at least two verifiable acceptance conditions, and risks. The plan must explicitly cover idempotent Telegram routing. Trace: bem948_p0_binding_repair_20260620T0935Z.

BEM-948 P0 binding-mode live object E2E. Return a strict JSON governance plan for WRK-C1 and the Claude provider object runtime binding. Trace: bem948_p0_binding_selftest_20260620T0940Z.

BEM-948 P0 runtime-probe binding object E2E. Return strict JSON for WRK-C1 and Claude object runtime binding; include objective, assumptions, three steps, two verifiable acceptance conditions, risks, and idempotent Telegram routing. Trace: bem948_p0_binding_runtime_probe_20260620T0945Z.
